body_text:
Hi Tarin

  

Just checking in — we still have a few Thanksgiving Eve pickup/delivery spots
open.

  

If you want to review the Thanksgiving menu again, I attached it below for
you.

  

Want me to save a spot for your order?  
Just reply **YES** and I’ll lock it in.  
  
or you can CLICK****[**HERE**](https://app.upserve.com/s/comeketo-restaurant-
and-sandwich-shop-leominster) to order  
  
![image.png](cid:1c10-4411-ba54)  
![image.png](cid:1754-e90d-5043)![image.png](cid:cd81-3a58-03fa)

  

  

  

  

  

  

Best,

  

**🔥 Comeketo Catering Events Team **  
**Comeketo Catering**  
📘[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/comeketocatering) | 📸 [Instagram](https://instagram.com/comeketocatering) | 🌐 [Website](https://comeketocatering.com/)

📲 My Direct: (978) 678 3739

📲 Catering Main: [(978) 381-1212](tel:9783811212)  
  
  

To stop receiving these emails, click
[here](https://app.close.com/go/unsubscribe/orga_pOyYOigKEELdmODukgjigCD5pTRewtmBW1yq6YXkskq/taringayles@gmail.com/NMGw63wbWa_eFmNkZQGSwO2fZx4onwXEZKr7xu1Mfkk=/)
